modules.module_title: CCTV Systems ka Parichay aur Mool Baatein (Introduction to CCTV Systems & Basics)
CCTV System ke Components (Hardware) (CCTV System Components - Hardware)
Installation Techniques aur Best Practices (Installation Techniques & Best Practices)
Configuration aur Networking Mool Baatein (Configuration & Networking Basics)
Testing, Troubleshooting aur Maintenance (Testing, Troubleshooting & Maintenance)
Safety, Standards aur Advanced Concepts (Safety, Standards & Advanced Concepts)

questions.question: CCTV ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Central Control Television

questions.explanation: CCTV ka full form Closed-Circuit Television hota hai, jiska matlab hai ki video signal sirf specific monitors par hi transmit hota hai.

questions.question: Ek basic CCTV system mein kaun sa component video record karta hai?

options.B: Monitor

questions.explanation: DVR (Digital Video Recorder) ya NVR (Network Video Recorder) video footage ko record aur store karte hain.

questions.question: Analog CCTV system mein video signal kis cable se transmit hota hai?

options.B: Fiber Optic Cable

questions.explanation: Analog CCTV systems mein Coaxial Cable (jaise RG59) video signal transmit karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: IP CCTV system mein data kaise transmit hota hai?

options.B: Digital signals over a network (LAN/WAN)

questions.explanation: IP (Internet Protocol) CCTV systems digital data ko network (LAN ya WAN) par transmit karte hain, jaise ki internet data.

questions.question: CCTV surveillance ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Security aur monitoring karna

questions.explanation: CCTV ka mukhya uddeshya suraksha aur kisi area ki continuous monitoring karna hai.

questions.question: Ek dome camera ka mukhya fayda kya hai?

options.B: Discreet design aur vandal-resistant casing

questions.explanation: Dome camera apni discreet design aur tamper-resistant casing ke karan popular hain, jo unhe vandal-resistant banata hai.

questions.question: DVR ka kya kaam hai?

options.A: Analog video ko digital mein convert karna aur record karna
options.B: Sirf live video display karna

questions.explanation: DVR (Digital Video Recorder) analog cameras se aaye video signals ko digital format mein convert karke hard drive par record karta hai.

questions.question: NVR kis type ke cameras ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: HD-TVI cameras

questions.explanation: NVR (Network Video Recorder) specifically IP (Internet Protocol) cameras ke liye design kiya gaya hai, jo digital video streams ko record karta hai.

questions.question: CCTV system mein 'resolution' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Video footage ki clarity aur detail

questions.explanation: Resolution video footage ki clarity aur detail ko refer karta hai, jo pixels mein maapa jata hai. Higher resolution matlab clearer image.

questions.question: Wireless CCTV system ka ek mukhya fayda kya hai?

options.B: More secure against hacking
options.C: Cabling ki zaroorat kam hoti hai
options.D: Power consumption bahut zyada hota hai

questions.explanation: Wireless CCTV systems mein cabling ki zaroorat kam hoti hai, jisse installation aasaan aur kam mahanga ho jata hai.

questions.question: Day/Night camera kis environment ke liye best hai?

options.B: Sirf raat ke liye
options.C: Din aur raat dono ke liye, low light mein bhi

questions.explanation: Day/Night cameras din ke ujjale mein color aur raat ya low light conditions mein black and white mode par switch karke achhi visibility provide karte hain.

questions.question: Pan-Tilt-Zoom (PTZ) camera ka kya use hai?

options.B: Camera ki direction aur zoom ko remotely control karna

questions.explanation: PTZ cameras ko remotely pan (horizontally), tilt (vertically), aur zoom kiya ja sakta hai, jisse ek bade area ko monitor karna aasaan ho jata hai.

questions.question: Ek CCTV system mein 'latency' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Live video aur actual event ke beech ka delay

questions.explanation: Latency live video stream mein hone wale delay ko kehte hain. High latency matlab real-time monitoring mein zyada deri.

questions.question: Kisi outdoor CCTV camera ke liye IP rating ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Dust aur water resistance level batata hai

questions.explanation: IP (Ingress Protection) rating batata hai ki camera dhool (dust) aur paani (water) se kitna protected hai, jo outdoor cameras ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Megapixel (MP) kiski unit hai?

options.B: Camera lens ka aperture

questions.explanation: Megapixel camera sensor ki resolution ko indicate karta hai. 1 Megapixel = 1 million pixels, jo zyada detail wali image provide karta hai.

questions.question: Hybrid DVR (HDVR) kya kar sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf IP cameras ko support karta hai
options.B: Sirf analog cameras ko support karta hai
options.C: Analog aur IP dono cameras ko support karta hai
options.D: Sirf wireless cameras ko support karta hai

questions.explanation: Hybrid DVR (HDVR) ek aisa device hai jo ek hi system mein analog, HD-TVI/AHD/CVI, aur IP cameras ko support kar sakta hai.

questions.question: CCTV system mein 'Frame Rate' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek second mein kitne individual images (frames) display hote hain

questions.explanation: Frame Rate (FPS - Frames Per Second) batata hai ki ek second mein kitne individual images ya frames record ya display ho rahe hain, jo video ki smoothness ko affect karta hai.

questions.question: IR (Infrared) LEDs ka kya kaam hai CCTV cameras mein?

options.B: Raat mein ya kam roshni mein visibility provide karna

questions.explanation: IR LEDs infrared light emit karte hain jo insaani aankh se dikhai nahi deti, lekin camera ke sensor ko raat mein bhi clear image capture karne mein help karti hai.

questions.question: Ek vari-focal lens ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Viewing angle aur zoom ko manually adjust kar sakte hain
options.C: Sirf wireless connectivity provide karta hai
options.D: Bahut kam power consume karta hai

questions.explanation: Vari-focal lens mein focal length ko manually adjust kiya ja sakta hai, jisse viewing angle aur zoom level ko installation site par customize kiya ja sake.

questions.question: PoE (Power over Ethernet) ka mukhya fayda kya hai IP cameras mein?

options.A: Separate power cable ki zaroorat nahi padti
options.B: Wireless connectivity provide karta hai

questions.explanation: PoE technology ek single Ethernet cable par data aur power dono provide karti hai, jisse separate power cable ki zaroorat khatam ho jaati hai aur installation aasaan ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Hard Disk Drive (HDD) ka kya role hai DVR/NVR mein?

options.B: Recorded video footage store karna

questions.explanation: HDD recorded video footage ko digital format mein store karta hai, jisse baad mein review kiya ja sake.

questions.question: BNC connector kis type ke cable ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Fiber optic cable

questions.explanation: BNC (Bayonet Neill-Concelman) connector aam taur par coaxial cables (jaise RG59) ke liye use hota hai analog CCTV systems mein.

questions.question: UTP cable ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Universal Transmission Protocol

questions.explanation: UTP ka full form Unshielded Twisted Pair hai, jo IP CCTV systems mein data transmission ke liye commonly use hota hai.

questions.question: Ek bullet camera ka mukhya fayda kya hai?

options.B: Long-range viewing aur robust housing

questions.explanation: Bullet cameras aam taur par outdoor use ke liye design kiye jaate hain, inki shape long-range viewing ke liye suitable hoti hai aur inka housing robust hota hai.

questions.question: CCTV camera ko power supply karne ke liye commonly kitne volts ka adapter use hota hai?

options.B: 12V DC

questions.explanation: Zyadatar CCTV cameras ko 12V DC power supply ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Balun ka kya kaam hai CCTV system mein?

options.A: Coaxial cable ko fiber optic mein convert karna
options.B: UTP cable par analog video signal ko transmit karna

questions.explanation: Balun (Balanced-Unbalanced) device coaxial cable se aane wale analog video signal ko UTP cable par transmit karne ke liye use hota hai, jisse lambi doori par video bheja ja sake.

questions.question: Kis type ka monitor CCTV footage dekhne ke liye best hai?

options.B: High-resolution LED/LCD monitor

questions.explanation: High-resolution LED/LCD monitors clear aur detailed footage provide karte hain, jo surveillance ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: CCTV camera ke 'Lens Aperture' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Kitni roshni lens se sensor tak pahunchti hai

questions.explanation: Aperture lens mein ek opening hoti hai jo control karti hai ki kitni roshni camera sensor tak pahunchegi. Isse image brightness aur depth of field affect hoti hai.

questions.question: Outdoor CCTV installations ke liye kaun sa cable type zyada durable hota hai?

options.B: Shielded Outdoor Rated Cat6 cable

questions.explanation: Outdoor rated (UV resistant aur waterproof) shielded Cat6 cable weather conditions aur EMI se better protection provide karta hai.

questions.question: PIR sensor ka kya use hai CCTV camera mein?

options.B: Motion detection ke liye human heat signature detect karna

questions.explanation: PIR (Passive Infrared) sensor body heat detect karke motion ko trigger karta hai, jisse false alarms kam hote hain.

questions.question: Network Switch ka kya kaam hai IP CCTV system mein?

options.B: Multiple IP cameras ko NVR se connect karna
options.D: Cameras ko fixed angle par lock karna

questions.explanation: Network Switch multiple network devices (jaise IP cameras aur NVR) ko ek network par connect karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: CCTV system mein 'UTC Controller' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Coaxial cable par OSD (On-Screen Display) menu control karna

questions.explanation: UTC (Up The Coax) Controller coaxial cable ke through camera ke OSD menu ko access aur control karne ki suvidha deta hai, jisse camera settings adjust ki ja sakti hain.

questions.question: Video analytics features kis type ke cameras mein common hain?

options.B: Basic HD cameras

questions.explanation: Smart IP cameras mein advanced video analytics jaise facial recognition, line crossing detection, object tracking jaise features hote hain.

questions.question: Ek junction box ka kya mahatva hai CCTV installation mein?

options.A: Sirf cables ko aesthetic look dena
options.B: Cable connections ko weather aur tampering se protect karna

questions.explanation: Junction box electrical connections ko weather elements, dhool aur tampering se bachane ke liye use hota hai, khaas kar outdoor installations mein.

questions.question: CCTV camera install karne se pehle sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Power supply connect karna
options.C: Site survey aur requirement analysis karna

questions.explanation: Ek successful installation ke liye sabse pehle site survey karke client ki requirements aur site ki limitations ko samajhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Camera placement karte time kya dhyan rakhna chahiye taaki blind spots na banen?

options.A: Cameras ko ek hi height par lagana
options.B: Overlapping fields of view rakhna
options.D: Cameras ko deewar ke beech mein lagana

questions.explanation: Blind spots se bachne ke liye cameras ke fields of view ko overlap karna chahiye, jisse koi area unmonitored na rahe.

questions.question: Coaxial cable ko terminate karte time kis tool ka use hota hai?

options.B: Wire stripper aur BNC crimping tool

questions.explanation: Coaxial cable ko BNC connector ke saath terminate karne ke liye wire stripper aur specific BNC crimping tool ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: IP camera ke liye Cat5e/Cat6 cable ko terminate karte time kaun sa wiring standard use hota hai?

options.B: RG59

questions.explanation: Ethernet cables ko terminate karne ke liye T568A ya T568B wiring standards ka use kiya jata hai, jinse straight-through ya crossover cables banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Outdoor cable routing karte time kya precaution lena chahiye?

options.A: Cables ko khule mein chhod dena
options.B: Cables ko conduit ya casing mein dalna
options.D: Cables ko high voltage wires ke paas se le jana

questions.explanation: Outdoor cables ko weather damage, physical damage aur rodents se bachane ke liye conduit ya PVC casing mein dalna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Camera mounting ke liye sahi screw aur wall plug ka selection kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Camera ki stability aur suraksha ke liye
options.C: Video quality improve karne ke liye
options.D: Power consumption kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sahi mounting hardware camera ko girne se bachata hai aur uski stability aur suraksha ensure karta hai, khaas kar outdoor ya high-traffic areas mein.

questions.question: Low light performance improve karne ke liye camera kis taraf face hona chahiye?

options.B: Light source se door

questions.explanation: Camera ko direct light source (jaise suraj ya bright light) ki taraf face karne se glare ya overexposure ho sakta hai, isliye usse door rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Power supply calculations karte time kya dhyan mein rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Har camera ka current consumption (Amps) aur total current requirement

questions.explanation: Sahi power supply choose karne ke liye har camera ke individual current consumption (Amps) ko jodkar total current requirement nikalna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Long cable runs (zyada lambi cables) par video signal loss ko kam karne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Video amplifier/extender

questions.explanation: Lambi cable runs par signal loss ko compensate karne ke liye video amplifier ya extender ka use kiya jata hai, khaas kar analog systems mein.

questions.question: Ek CCTV technician ke paas kaun sa basic tool hona chahiye?

options.B: Multimeter

questions.explanation: Multimeter voltage, current aur continuity check karne ke liye ek essential tool hai, jo troubleshooting aur power verification mein kaam aata hai.

questions.question: CCTV camera ko direct sunlight se bachane ke liye kya kar sakte hain?

options.B: Sun shield ya hood lagana
options.C: Usse kaale rang mein paint karna

questions.explanation: Sun shield ya hood direct sunlight ko block karke camera lens par glare ko kam karta hai aur camera ko overheat hone se bachata hai.

questions.question: Konse environment mein dome camera preferable hai?

options.A: Bahut lambi doori ki monitoring ke liye
options.B: Discreet surveillance aur vandal-resistance required ho wahan

questions.explanation: Dome cameras apni discreet design aur tough casing ke karan indoor public spaces ya jahan vandal-resistance zaroori ho, wahan preferred hain.

questions.question: Cables ko neatly manage karne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Cable ties, clips aur trays

questions.explanation: Cable ties, clips aur cable trays cables ko organized aur neat rakhne mein help karte hain, jisse maintenance aur troubleshooting aasaan ho.

questions.question: Agar hum IP camera ko PoE switch se connect kar rahe hain, to alag se power adapter ki zaroorat padegi kya?

options.B: Nahi, kyunki PoE switch power bhi provide karta hai
options.D: Sirf tab jab cable bahut lambi ho

questions.explanation: PoE (Power over Ethernet) switch data ke saath-saath camera ko power bhi deta hai, isliye alag se power adapter ki zaroorat nahi padti.

questions.question: CCTV system installation ke baad, image quality check karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf camera on karke chhod dena
options.B: Live footage review karna, focus aur viewing angle adjust karna

questions.explanation: Installation ke baad, har camera ka live footage check karna, focus adjust karna, aur viewing angle ko optimize karna zaroori hai taaki best image quality mile.

questions.question: Ek CCTV system mein earthing (grounding) kyon important hai?

options.A: Video footage ko encrypt karne ke liye
options.B: Electric shocks se bachne aur equipment ko surge se protect karne ke liye
options.D: Hard disk ki lifespan badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper earthing electrical safety ke liye crucial hai. Yeh electric shocks se bachata hai aur equipment ko voltage surges aur lightning strikes se protect karta hai.

questions.question: Kisi factory jaise noisy electrical environment mein konsa cable prefer kiya jayega?

options.B: Shielded Twisted Pair (STP)

questions.explanation: STP cable, UTP ke mukable, electrical noise aur interference ke khilaf zyada protection provide karta hai, jo industrial environments ke liye suitable hai.

questions.question: DVR/NVR mein date aur time settings ko sahi rakhna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf system ko chalane ke liye
options.B: Recorded footage ko sahi timestamp ke saath dekhne ke liye
options.D: Power consumption kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sahi date aur time recorded footage ko review karte time events ko accurately track karne aur evidence ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: IP camera ko network mein configure karne ke liye sabse pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Uska IP address

questions.explanation: IP camera ko network par access aur configure karne ke liye uska IP address (ya default IP) pata hona zaroori hai.

questions.question: DVR/NVR mein motion detection feature ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Jab koi movement detect ho tabhi recording shuru karna, storage bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Motion detection feature sirf tab record karta hai jab camera ke view mein movement ho, jisse hard disk storage space bachti hai aur footage review karna aasaan hota hai.

questions.question: Remote viewing ke liye DVR/NVR ko internet se connect karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Network cable aur internet connection

questions.explanation: Remote viewing ke liye DVR/NVR ko network cable se router/modem se connect karke internet access dena zaroori hai.

questions.question: Port Forwarding kyon kiya jata hai remote viewing ke liye?

options.A: Local network mein cameras ko detect karne ke liye
options.B: Internet se DVR/NVR tak traffic ko allow karne ke liye
options.C: Camera ki resolution badhane ke liye
options.D: Hard disk ko format karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Port Forwarding router par ek configuration hai jo incoming internet traffic ko specific internal network device (jaise DVR/NVR) tak forward karta hai, jisse remote access possible hota hai.

questions.question: CCTV system mein 'User Accounts' banana kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf system ko slow karne ke liye
options.B: Access control aur security ke liye
options.C: Video compression improve karne ke liye
options.D: Camera lens adjust karne ke liye

questions.explanation: User accounts aur passwords access control provide karte hain, jisse sirf authorized log hi system ko access aur control kar saken.

questions.question: Static IP address aur Dynamic IP address mein kya antar hai?

options.B: Static IP change nahi hota, Dynamic IP change hota rehta hai
options.C: Static IP sirf wireless devices ke liye hai
options.D: Dynamic IP zyada secure hota hai

questions.explanation: Static IP address ek fixed IP address hota hai jo kabhi change nahi hota, jabki Dynamic IP address DHCP server dwara assign kiya jata hai aur samay-samay par badal sakta hai.

questions.question: Mobile app se remote viewing setup karte time kya information zaroori hoti hai?

options.B: DVR/NVR ka IP address ya P2P ID, port number aur login credentials

questions.explanation: Mobile app se connect karne ke liye DVR/NVR ka network address (IP/DDNS/P2P ID), port number aur uske login credentials chahiye hote hain.

questions.question: DDNS (Dynamic DNS) ka kya fayda hai remote access mein?

options.A: Static IP address provide karta hai
options.B: Dynamic IP address ko ek fixed domain name se link karta hai
options.D: Sirf local network par kaam karta hai

questions.explanation: DDNS service dynamic IP address ko ek easy-to-remember domain name se link karti hai, jisse dynamic IP change hone par bhi remote access maintain rehta hai.

questions.question: DVR/NVR ke 'recording schedule' ko set karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf system ko on-off karne ke liye
options.B: Kab aur kaise recording ho, yeh decide karne ke liye
options.C: Camera ka focus adjust karne ke liye
options.D: Monitor ki brightness adjust karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Recording schedule set karke aap decide kar sakte hain ki recording kab ho (continuous, motion-triggered, ya scheduled time par), jisse storage ko efficiently manage kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Agar IP camera network par detect nahi ho raha hai, to kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Network cable connection aur camera ka power

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle network cable connection ko verify karna chahiye ki woh sahi se laga hai aur camera ko power mil rahi hai ya nahi.

questions.question: Video compression standard (jaise H.264, H.265) ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Video file size aur storage efficiency

questions.explanation: Video compression standards video file size ko kam karte hain bina quality zyada degrade kiye, jisse storage space bachti hai aur network bandwidth kam use hoti hai.

questions.question: Admin password ko regular intervals par change karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Video quality improve karne ke liye
options.B: System ki security badhane ke liye
options.C: Hard disk ki speed badhane ke liye
options.D: Cable ki lifespan badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Admin password ko regular intervals par change karna unauthorized access se bachne aur system ki security ko maintain rakhne ke liye ek best practice hai.

questions.question: P2P (Peer-to-Peer) connectivity ka kya fayda hai remote viewing mein?

options.A: Port forwarding ki zaroorat padti hai
options.B: Port forwarding ki zaroorat nahi padti, installation aasan hoti hai
options.C: Sirf local network par kaam karta hai

questions.explanation: P2P connectivity se remote viewing ke liye port forwarding ki zaroorat nahi padti, jisse non-technical users ke liye setup aasan ho jata hai.

questions.question: Agar DVR/NVR ka hard disk full ho jaye, to kya hoga?

options.B: Oldest footage automatically overwrite ho jayegi (agar configured ho)
options.C: Naye cameras add nahi kar payenge

questions.explanation: Agar 'overwrite' option enable ho, to hard disk full hone par system automatically sabse purani footage ko naye footage se overwrite kar deta hai.

questions.question: Network Time Protocol (NTP) ka kya use hai CCTV system mein?

options.A: Network speed test karne ke liye
options.B: Sabhi devices par accurate time sync karne ke liye
options.C: Video compression improve karne ke liye
options.D: Camera lens adjust karne ke liye

questions.explanation: NTP server network par sabhi devices (DVR/NVR, cameras) ke time ko automatically sync karta hai, jisse footage par accurate timestamps ensure hote hain.

questions.question: Video stream ko main stream aur sub-stream mein divide karna kyon useful hai?

options.B: High quality recording aur low bandwidth remote viewing ke liye alag-alag streams manage karna
options.C: Audio quality improve karne ke liye
options.D: Camera ki power efficiency badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Main stream high-resolution recording ke liye hoti hai, jabki sub-stream low-resolution aur kam bandwidth wali hoti hai, jo mobile viewing ya live preview ke liye efficient hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar CCTV monitor par 'No Video' message aa raha hai, to sabse pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Camera aur DVR/NVR ke beech cable connection aur power supply

questions.explanation: No video aane par sabse common reason cable connection loose ya cut hona, ya camera ko power na milna hota hai.

questions.question: Blurry ya out-of-focus image ka kya possible reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Lens ka focus sahi se adjust nahi hai

questions.explanation: Blurry image ka sabse common reason camera lens ka focus sahi se adjust na hona hota hai. Manual adjustment se yeh theek ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar IR night vision kaam nahi kar raha, to kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: IR LEDs ki functionality aur power supply

questions.explanation: IR LEDs ko power na milna ya unka kharab hona night vision na hone ka mukhya karan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: DVR/NVR par 'HDD Error' message aa raha hai, to kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Hard disk connection check karna ya hard disk replace karna

questions.explanation: HDD Error ka matlab hard disk connect nahi hai, kharab hai ya usme koi issue hai. Connection check karein ya hard disk replace karein.

questions.question: CCTV camera par cobwebs ya dhool jama hone par kya hoga?

options.B: Video quality degrade ho jayegi aur night vision block ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Cobwebs aur dhool lens ko block kar sakte hain, jisse image blurry ya dull dikhegi aur IR light block hone se night vision effect ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Preventive maintenance mein kya shamil hai?

options.A: Sirf system kharab hone par theek karna
options.B: Regular cleaning, connections check karna aur software updates

questions.explanation: Preventive maintenance mein regular checks, cleaning, software updates aur connections ki verification shamil hai, jisse system ki lifespan badhti hai aur failures kam hote hain.

questions.question: Agar remote viewing kaam nahi kar raha hai, to kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Internet connection, router settings (port forwarding/P2P) aur DVR/NVR network settings

questions.explanation: Remote viewing issues mein internet connectivity, router (port forwarding/P2P) aur DVR/NVR ke network settings ko check karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Video footage mein horizontal lines ya ripples aane ka kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Electrical interference ya ground loop issue

questions.explanation: Yeh electrical interference ya ground loop ke common symptoms hain. Iske liye proper grounding aur video balun ka use kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Camera ki power supply unit (PSU) kharab hone par kya hoga?

options.A: Camera ki image quality badh jayegi
options.B: Camera on nahi hoga ya intermittent power issue aayega

questions.explanation: Kharab PSU camera ko sahi voltage ya current nahi de payegi, jisse camera on nahi hoga ya intermittent power loss hoga.

questions.question: Firmware update kyon zaroori hai DVR/NVR aur cameras ke liye?

options.A: Sirf system ka color change karne ke liye
options.B: Bug fixes, security patches aur naye features add karne ke liye
options.C: Hard disk ko format karne ke liye
options.D: Cable ki length badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Firmware updates system ki performance, security aur functionality ko improve karte hain, aur naye features bhi add kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar NVR IP cameras ko detect nahi kar raha hai, to kya troubleshooting steps lenge?

options.B: Camera aur NVR ke IP addresses, subnet mask aur gateway check karna

questions.explanation: IP cameras ko detect na hone par network settings (IP, subnet, gateway) ka mismatch ek common issue hota hai. Unhe check aur adjust karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: CCTV camera lens par condensation (bhaap) jamne ka kya karan hai?

options.B: Temperature aur humidity ka sudden change

questions.explanation: Jab temperature aur humidity mein sudden change hota hai, to lens par condensation ho sakti hai, jisse image blurry ho jati hai.

questions.question: Recorded footage ko retrieve karne ke liye kya procedure hai?

options.A: DVR/NVR ko directly computer se connect karna
options.B: DVR/NVR ke playback menu se date/time select karke footage export karna (USB/network)
options.D: Hard disk ko physically nikal kar PC mein lagana

questions.explanation: Recorded footage ko retrieve karne ke liye DVR/NVR ke playback menu ka use karke specific date/time ki footage ko USB drive ya network par export kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Agar DVR/NVR reboot ho raha hai baar-baar, to kya possible reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Unstable power supply ya overheating

questions.explanation: Unstable power supply (fluctuations) ya overheating DVR/NVR ke baar-baar reboot hone ka common karan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Network camera mein 'pixelation' (image ka blocky hona) ka kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Low bandwidth ya network congestion

questions.explanation: Pixelation ya blocky image network cameras mein low bandwidth, network congestion ya packet loss ke karan hoti hai, jisse video stream data sahi se receive nahi ho pata.

questions.question: CCTV system ke 'health check' mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: All cameras working, recording, remote access, HDD status, date/time sync

questions.explanation: Health check mein system ke sabhi components ki functionality verify karna shamil hai: cameras, recording, remote access, storage aur time sync.

questions.question: Electrical safety ke liye CCTV installation karte time kya precaution lena chahiye?

options.A: Live wires ko nange haathon se pakadna
options.B: Power off karna aur insulated tools use karna
options.D: Sare wires ko ek saath jod dena

questions.explanation: Shock se bachne ke liye kaam shuru karne se pehle power off karna aur insulated tools ka use karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Data privacy laws (jaise GDPR) CCTV footage par kaise apply hote hain?

options.A: Unka CCTV se koi lena-dena nahi hai
options.B: Footage ko responsibly store aur manage karna zaroori hai
options.C: Footage ko public mein share karna chahiye
options.D: Sirf government offices mein apply hote hain

questions.explanation: Data privacy laws ke tahat, CCTV footage ko personal data mana jata hai, isliye usko securely store karna, unauthorized access se bachana aur retention policy follow karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Lightning arrester ka kya use hai CCTV system mein?

options.B: Bijli girne se hone wale nuksan se system ko bachana

questions.explanation: Lightning arrester bijli girne par high voltage surge ko divert karke CCTV equipment ko damage hone se bachata hai.

questions.question: CCTV footage ko kitne samay tak store karna chahiye?

options.B: Jab tak hard disk full na ho jaye
options.C: Local laws aur client ki requirements ke according

questions.explanation: Footage retention period local laws, regulations aur client ki specific security requirements par nirbhar karta hai. Iski ek policy honi chahiye.

questions.question: IP CCTV system mein cybersecurity risks kya ho sakte hain?

options.B: Unauthorized access, hacking aur data breach

questions.explanation: IP cameras aur NVRs network se connect hote hain, isliye woh hacking, unauthorized access aur data breach jaise cybersecurity risks ke prone ho sakte hain agar proper security measures na liye jayen.

questions.question: Storage calculation karte time kin factors ko dhyan mein rakhte hain?

options.B: Number of cameras, resolution, frame rate aur compression method

questions.explanation: Storage requirement calculate karte time cameras ki sankhya, video resolution, frame rate aur video compression standard (jaise H.265) bahut mahatvপূর্ণ hote hain.

questions.question: UPS (Uninterruptible Power Supply) ka kya fayda hai CCTV system mein?

options.B: Power cut hone par system ko kuch samay tak chalaye rakhna

questions.explanation: UPS power cut hone par CCTV system ko backup power provide karta hai, jisse continuous monitoring aur recording maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Cloud-based CCTV storage ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Off-site storage, remote access aur physical damage se suraksha

questions.explanation: Cloud storage recorded footage ko off-site server par store karta hai, jisse footage physical damage se surakshit rehti hai aur kahin se bhi access ki ja sakti hai.

questions.question: Public places par CCTV lagate samay kis baat ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Privacy concerns aur signage (CCTV laga hone ki soochana) ka dhyan rakhna

questions.explanation: Public places par CCTV lagate samay logon ki privacy ka dhyan rakhna aur yeh clearly indicate karna ki area surveillance mein hai (signage) kaanooni aur ethical requirement hai.

questions.question: Video management software (VMS) ka kya role hai bade CCTV systems mein?

options.B: Multiple cameras, NVRs aur advanced analytics ko centrally manage karna

questions.explanation: VMS ek centralized platform hai jo bade aur complex CCTV systems mein multiple cameras, NVRs, aur video analytics features ko manage aur control karta hai.

questions.question: PoE+ (Power over Ethernet Plus) ka kya fayda hai standard PoE ke mukable?

options.B: Zyada power deliver karta hai, high-power devices ke liye

questions.explanation: PoE+ (802.3at) standard PoE (802.3af) se zyada power (up to 30W per port) deliver karta hai, jo PTZ cameras ya high-power IP cameras ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: CCTV installation mein 'right of way' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Camera ko kisi bhi direction mein lagana
options.B: Cable routing ke liye zaroori permission aur access

questions.explanation: Right of way ka matlab hai ki cables ya equipment install karne ke liye zaroori permissions aur legal rights hona, khaas kar public property ya private property par.

questions.question: Artificial Intelligence (AI) ka CCTV mein kya use ho sakta hai?

options.B: Advanced analytics jaise facial recognition, object detection aur abnormal behavior analysis

questions.explanation: AI-powered CCTV systems advanced analytics jaise facial recognition, object detection aur specific events ko automatically identify karke security ko enhance karte hain.

questions.question: CCTV system ke 'Bandwidth Calculation' kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf camera ka model number janne ke liye
options.B: Network par kitna data traffic generate hoga, yeh estimate karne ke liye
options.C: Hard disk ki capacity badhane ke liye
options.D: Monitor ka size decide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Bandwidth calculation se yeh pata chalta hai ki IP cameras kitna network traffic generate karenge, jisse network infrastructure ko sahi se plan kiya ja sake aur lag issues se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: CCTV system ki 'audit trail' feature ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf video playback speed control karna
options.B: System mein kiye gaye sabhi actions (login, logout, settings changes) ko record karna

questions.explanation: Audit trail feature system mein kiye gaye sabhi user actions aur changes ko record karta hai, jo security, accountability aur troubleshooting ke liye useful hai.

questions.question: CCTV system ko cyber threats se bachane ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Strong passwords, network segmentation aur regular firmware updates

questions.explanation: Cyber threats se bachne ke liye strong aur unique passwords use karna, network segmentation (CCTV network ko main network se alag rakhna), aur devices ke firmware ko regularly update karna bahut zaroori hai.
